title: Bombay HC restrains Santosh Kumar from making allegations that Aditya Dhar copied Dhurandhar script
description: The Bombay High Court has passed an interim order restraining filmmaker Santosh Kumar RS from repeating comments concerning the script of Hindi film Dhurandhar, which were flagged as defamatory by the film's writer-director Aditya Dhar [Aditya Dhar v. Santosh Kumar RS & Ors].Justice Arif S Doctor passed the order on a defamation suit filed by Dhar against Kumar. The Court noted that while Kumar had been served notice of the case, none appeared for him.The Court proceeded to grant Dhar limite
